Robe of the Kedge  
 

No Trade Quest Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 8
STA: +10 MANA: +100
Focus: Reagent Conservation III
WT: 1.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Robe of the Kedge
No Trade Quest Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 8
STA: +10 MANA: +100
Focus: Reagent Conservation III
WT: 1.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Robe of the Kedge
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Cohort Chalybeius
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 03:06:34
Page Updated:Sun Apr 26th, 2020

Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kedge Keep
NPC Name
Phinigel Autropos

Kithicor Forest
NPC Name
Advisor C`zatl
Coercer Q`ioul

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Highpass Hold
Quest Name
Rogue Epic: Ragebringer

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kedge Keep
Kithicor Forest
You may also hail a harbinger of the seas in Kedge Keep to spawn a loot-locked version of Phinigel Autropos that will only drop the Robe of the Kedge.


Uploaded January 11th, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction

Robe
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2008 at 9:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591945089959
9 posts
Been camping Phinny off and on for my friends Mage Epic. He finally spawns and he drops 2 Robe of the Kedge. Needless to say I now have 2 of them available for MQ on the Luclin Server. Send in-game e-mail to Tauvina if you want one.
▲ Page top
Drop Rate
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2008 at 7:47 AM Rating: Good
lyrad
Scholar
46 posts
My experience with trying to get this robe for my Rogue's Epic:

Phinigel killed x2
Coercer killed x6 (dropped Ishva robe every time)
Advisor killed x7 (dropped robe)

Pulling the Dark elves is pretty straightforward process:
Harmony/Pacify all the elves, no need to harmony the undead they wont agro from a range pull.
Pull the Coercer or Advisor with low agro range pull
Kill

If you end up with an add anyway, simply pull the add to Rivervale zone and snare. The add will stay there while you zone out and back in then go kill your intended target.

Edited, Dec 8th 2008 8:48am by lyrad

Edited, Dec 8th 2008 8:48am by lyrad
____________________________
hunter lyrad cypresshade forest stalker + officer of destiny + eqmac
▲ Page top
Confirm Kithicor Dark Elf drop
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2008 at 9:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592347333397
Scholar
244 posts
As stated in another post here.

Just kill the named Dark Elves at the hut in Kithicor to this robe.
Save time and avoid camping Phinigel.
However, make sure you leave at least one named Dark Elf up
to do the turn in to get the General to spawn.

We wiped them all out but one and two robes dropped.
Robe of Ishva dropped as well.
▲ Page top
Robe of the kedge
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2007 at 11:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592311173496
2 posts
Its alot easier to kill Coercer Q'ioul, do this as u kill general, all those dark elves will need to be killed anyways, she drops the kedge robe and the ishva btw

no more MQ on this item?
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2007 at 6:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591889741651
3 posts
tried to MQ this, turned in the kedge robe first to Vilnius the Small with my necro, rogue tried to hand in next robe and Vilnius would not accept any of the 3 remaining robes and just gave them back. nice waste of time camping for kedge robe for npc to just keep it! don't know if makes a different but robe drop came from phinny.

227 posts
Killed all at the burned cabin today with my 73 paly... last mob killed was advisor ...he dropped the kedge robe...coercer dropped the ishva robe....had a friend help with the other robe in steamfont...had trouble with him myself...rather it was gonna take really long time with my paly...minutes later had 3 of 4 and the other robe had been rotting in bank for sometime....mq'ed for my rogue..happy rogue...have fun and play politely (per GM's)

# Apr 17 2005 at 10:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591803818376
47 posts
Free, if you are friends with wizards. There were a few in my guild who had just done their epic, and they had a kedge robe sitting around waiting to be MQed, from when they killed Phinny.

Talk to your guild wizards before buying this MQ.

Double the Robes Double your fun
QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2004 at 11:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260192450
14 posts
Just soloed phini with my 64 mage, been soloing him quite a bit, already got my epic drop and turned in, but did this one for a guildie bard hoping to get a backbone, the most common of the drops i have seen from the big fish.

Anyways kill phini and what do you know, 2 robes drop, well it just so happens there are 2 rogues in guild that can use the mq, so woot, but first time they dropped for me, and get 2 at once.

▲ Page top
RE: Off topic - Coffins saved via Reagent Conservation
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2004 at 5:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792815876
View User Forum
Scholar
72 posts
Reagent Conservation will sometimes save you a coffin, but you're right... In over 15 corpse summons with the unstackable jade coffins, my iksar necro Tyulk has only gotten Reagent Conservation to trigger once.

It's certainly not a very big chance to save the item, but it feels good to save 150 pp at once!
▲ Page top
Corrections
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2003 at 1:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259097291
3 posts
Common of of the Coercer is the Ishva. Rare is the Kedge. The kedge robe looks pale blue with green trim (as seen on fashion pics) The kedge robe also drops off a single advisor not off any of them. His name begins with a C` but not exactly certain. The coercer is a tough mob and cannot be mezed. Best way to do this is at day time and during the breif period when the undead within the cabin are depopped. The robe itself is terrible for any caster, its basically for epics. I would not suggest MQ this to anyone unless you are that filthy rich. With a mule or simply camping every day outside of the cabin you can check on her and in time she will be wearing it. A FD puller is a MUST for single pulling her away, without one DO NOT attempt to kill her, you will get eatn. Hope this helps.
▲ Page top
RE: Corrections
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2004 at 3:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600042667564
Scholar
200 posts
The robe itself is terrible for any caster

I am sorry but I don't agree with that :
- 100 mana is HUGE for a newbie caster, I love to twink alts with Robe of the Kedge - no recommended level on it :)
- Reagent Conservation III is useful for wizards who have to chain cast Spell Shield in some raids and who don't want to sacrifice too much of their mana switching to a mage necklace or any other crap RCIII/IV item ...

However, I agree that rogue epics should be a priority, as far as the use of the Kedge Robe in the quest is concerned.

__DEL__1592257923934

__DEL__1591789602463

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 17 2002 at 10:16 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Selling MQs of this robe for the Cazic Quill on the Terris-Thule server. Send a /tell to Seifena. I'm on most of the time. If not I'm on my Mage, Xaell.
color
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2002 at 2:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250525751
View User Forum
7 posts
ok for those wondering about color of robe its is a baby blue with green trim in luclin graphics.
I made a lv 1 halfling they sneak hide at lv 1
sat her behind some trees near the de cabin and
would log her on a few times a day to check on corcerer. the loc of the cabin is about pos 900
pos 2000. yes my halfling did die a few times when i logged her on cause sneak hide skill fails sometimes at lv 1 and a bear or something would kill her before i could get her hidden. but its an easy trip back from Rv
anyway it worked for me Gl people

▲ Page top
This is batter than a Bonecaster at level 60
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2002 at 1:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773413424
8 posts
This robe Gives me 13 Extra mana with the Current Luclin updated mana calcs. And it looks pretty Sweet too.

This is batter than a Bonecaster at level 60
and Gives you more room to Upgrade INT gear.

How Much Do Rogue's Pay for a MQ of this? In my Many Phinny Killinhs on Cazic Thule i have only seen 2 of these drop.

60 Sorcerer
Cazic Thule

Edited, Mon Jul 1 17:41:00 2002
▲ Page top
RE: This is batter than a Bonecaster at level 60
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2003 at 2:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
It's pretty rare off of Phinny, but not nearly as rare in Kithicor, which is where most rogues go to if they need this for their epic. Usually the only rogues that get this in Kedge Keep are ones that were there incidentally to help kill Phinny for some bard, wizard, or mage's epic, and this happened to drop.

I don't know how other guilds do this, but the only way our guild would let a caster roll on this is if there aren't any rogues present on the raid that need this. It's far more important to let someone get an EPIC piece than to get a merely useful piece of gear.

Edited, Tue Apr 22 03:04:40 2003
▲ Page top
RE: This is batter than a Bonecaster at level 60
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2002 at 5:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
I've seen Rogues pay as much as 13k or more for this MQd. He was desperate though, so I don't know. You CAN get this robe to drop off the Dark Elves in Kithicor with one well-trained, higher level group. I've heard it drops as much as 1 in 3 kills, so if you want a Kedge, this may be a more frequent way to get it.

As for me, I'm currently waiting on a V'Ghera raid to finish up my epic, and I hope to HELL he drops the Quill (1 in 10) so I don't need the robes, but if he doesn't, I don't know. I suppose I'll enlist some help and start killing Smurfs.
▲ Page top

__DEL__1595780203143

I would think at 60, you would have a good no drop robe. Not bonecasters

▲ Page top
More Kedge Mobs
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2002 at 1:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246614042
12 posts
Just got my kedge tonight. I have been watching to Coercer in Kith all weekend and she hadn't moved. She was standing outside the house, but was wearing the Ishva robe.

After getting 3 groups wiped out, we brought in an expericed monk puller of General raids. Our attempt was to dispell the Coercer with Pumice, and pull entire house. Monk would FD, and the rest would leave while the coercer would rebuff at spot. Then we could tag the coercer by herself and pull to crossroads. Needless to say it didn't quiet work out but pulled Istov(sp) and the advisor. We dropped both. It was off the advisor that I got my Kedge. We then pulled the coercer and she had only the Ishva.

Someone before told me that any in the DE house could drop the Kedge, and now I believe them. So if your looking for your Kedge, and you have the manpower, you can clear the DE house in Kith for more chances to get it. We only wanted the Coercer, but was lucky to pull the other 2 also.

Aruun Dur'Faroth
55th Blackguard
Cazic Thule
▲ Page top
